summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TratorShop admin panel functionality. All backend APIs working perfectly. Frontend admin panel accessible and functional after password change. Storage/Upload functionality confirmed working with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured.

ui_bugs.issue: First-time admin login requires password change but frontend flow has session management issues
ui_bugs.workaround: Password can be changed via API, then frontend works normally

passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin@tratorshop.com / Admin@123
Admin panel dashboard loads and displays statistics
Admin panel navigation (Dashboard, Anúncios, Dealers, Usuários tabs)
Admin stats API returns correct data (users, listings, categories)
User management APIs (list users, update limits, promote to admin)
Listing management APIs (list, filter by status, update, approve)
All backend API endpoints returning 200 status
Admin session management working after password change
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend issue: Admin password change flow has session management issues on first login. Consider improving the password change form handling or session persistence. All core admin functionality is working correctly.
